headline: Kimco Q1 FFO Beats Estimates on Strong Leasing, Higher Rents
summary: KIM posts a Q1 2026 FFO beat as leasing demand, rent growth and higher occupancy across grocery-anchored centers drive stronger revenues.

headline: The Dark Side Of Dividend Investing That Leads To Underperformance
summary: There are hidden risks of dividend investing that can hurt long-term returns. Click here to know the ways to avoid them for a stronger retirement strategy.

headline: REG's Q1 FFO Misses Estimates, Revenues Top on Leasing Momentum
summary: Regency Centers' Q1 FFO falls short of estimates, but revenues beat on strong leasing momentum, solid rent spreads and occupancy.
